/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE CMakeFiles/KokkosBatched_Test_GMRES.dir/KokkosBatched_Test_GMRES.cpp.o -o KokkosBatched_Test_GMRES  ../../../../libkokkoskernels.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkoscontainers.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkosalgorithms.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkossimd.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkoscore.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/10/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so -ldl
